title: What Europe Should Contribute to the New World Paradigm
description: Jacques Cheminade, former Presidential Candidate of France, delivers the keynote address on Panel III of the Schiller Institute's international conference, Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind, in Bad Soden, Germany, November 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/
